title: LORD, Let My Cry before You Come

verses.text: Praises will pour forth from my lips; you teach me all your statutes, LORD. Since your commandments all are right, joyful, my tongue will sing your word.
LORD, let your hand be near to help; for your commandments are my choice. I long for your salvation, LORD, and in your precepts I rejoice.
Let my soul live and boast in you; let your commandments help me, LORD. Seek me, your sheep who’s gone astray, for I, your servant, know your word.
